/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libuser_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libuser_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/user_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/user_interface/msg/detail/user_int__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/user_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/user_interface/srv/detail/add_and_odd__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/boyfriend51/gong/gong_ws/build/user_interface:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libuser_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
